title: Houk Air Conditioning
description: Houk AC is a leading HVAC repair and installation service based in Texas, operating in areas such as DFW, Austin, Houston, and San Antonio since 1962. The company offers a variety of services including air conditioning and heating repairs, installations, maintenance, and commercial HVAC solutions. Known for their commitment to customer satisfaction, Houk AC provides special financing options, discounts, and a comprehensive maintenance program to meet the needs of both residential and commercial clients. With a family-owned approach, their dedicated technicians are focused on delivering reliable and energy-efficient solutions to ensure optimal comfort for Texans.
